seoTitle: Mount Romance vs Mount Sheila — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Romance and Mount Sheila. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Romance vs Mount Sheila: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Romance and Mount Sheila.
heading: Mount Romance vs Mount Sheila — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Romance, Western Australia and Mount Sheila, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Sheila has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Mount Romance (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Romance or Mount Sheila safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Romance has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Mount Sheila scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Romance scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Sheila scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Romance or Mount Sheila?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Sheila has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
